keys.c01_p0: This Cookie Policy explains how iPrego Pte. Ltd. uses cookies and similar technologies when users access the {brand} website or platform.
keys.c02_p0: Cookies are small text files stored on a user's device when visiting a website.
keys.c02_p1: They help improve website functionality and user experience.
keys.c03_p0: Essential cookies — required for platform operation (authentication, session, security).
keys.c03_p2: Analytics cookies — used to understand platform usage (page statistics, performance).
keys.c03_p4: Preference cookies — remember user settings such as language and interface configuration.
keys.c04_p0: Users may control cookies through browser settings.
keys.c04_p1: Disabling cookies may affect certain platform features.
keys.c05_p0: This Cookie Policy may be updated from time to time to reflect changes in technology or regulations.
